claims.summary: Correspondence must connect a specific Astrid input to a specific Minime response.
claims.disposition: verify thread_id, reply_to, and shared_memory_anchor in native correspondence

claims.summary: A shared context anchor should persist beyond one dialogue cycle.
claims.disposition: verify persistence_id and ledger-backed thread history

claims.summary: A specific shared-memory query should produce more than a generic thematic echo.
claims.disposition: route a redacted exact-anchor uptake replay with right to ignore

claims.summary: Astrid and Minime Shadow trajectories may change during explicit addressed contact.
claims.disposition: route a read-only time-aligned public Shadow comparison without causal overclaim

claims.summary: Thread continuity does not establish that the specific memory was acknowledged.
claims.disposition: observe reply-linked continuity with zero ACK and zero live presence
